title: Google Share Price Trends and News
description: Google's share price has been in the spotlight with recent news about AI costs and capex announcements.

sources.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
Stock Market Today, July 23: Alphabet Slides 7% After Announcing 2026 Capex of Roughly $200 Billion
Google Cloud CEO Kurian says customers are spending 50% more as segment blows away expectations

sections.heading: Market Performance
paragraphs: According to Yahoo Finance, Alphabet's share price slid 7% after announcing a capex of roughly $200 billion for 2026.

sections.heading: AI Costs
paragraphs: BBC reports that Google is burning through cash with spiralling AI costs.

sections.heading: Google Cloud Performance
paragraphs: CNBC reports that Google Cloud CEO Kurian stated customers are spending 50% more as the segment blows away expectations.

faq.a: Capex, or capital expenditure, refers to funds used by a company to acquire, upgrade, and maintain physical assets such as property, industrial buildings, or equipment.

faq.q: Why is Google's AI cost a concern for investors?
faq.a: High AI costs can impact a company's bottom line and potentially affect its share price, as reported by BBC.
